name: XM1014 | 半调转换
descriptionEn: The XM1014 is a powerful fully automatic shotgun that justifies its heftier price tag with the ability to paint a room with lead fast. It has been custom painted using a multicolored halftone design. \"It's from a zoo, but instead of animals on display it's art\"
descriptionZh: XM1014 是一把强大的全自动霰弹枪，其高昂的价格赋予了它高射速和室内清剿的能力。 这款定制涂装采用了多彩半色调图案进。 “它来自一个动物园，但展示的不是动物而是艺术”
